We are 2 people traveling from Shanghai to Chongqing for 3 days, and we need to meet any one of the following requirements:  
1. Want to try one of these restaurants: Caibench Flavor Chaoshan Beef Hot Pot (Longhu Chunsen Xingyuehui Branch)  
2. Want to try a restaurant of the following type: Sichuan cuisine
